title: Polymer clay cloisonne-style enamel pendant
notes: A pendant approximately 35 mm diameter using black polymer clay as the cloisonne wire base. Roll very thin snakes of black clay, arrange on a backing sheet in a geometric or floral pattern, then fill the cells with different coloured clays. Cure, sand flat from 400 to 1000 grit, buff to a high shine. The effect reads as metalwork enamel.
